title: Git Substrate Adapters V1
summary: Defines and closes the first proposal boundary for Git-substrate projected adapters so deterministic Git-state and semantic-diff surfaces are realized without elevating adapter outputs into authority.

resolved_items.title: Authority location
resolved_items.detail: The existing metadata model remains the sole authority baseline; gix and sem outputs are projection artifacts only.

resolved_items.title: Adapter classification
resolved_items.detail: gix is the deterministic Git fact surface and sem is the semantic diff enrichment surface.

resolved_items.title: Git semantic example
resolved_items.detail: A first canonical semantic example now exists for repo_state, diff_state, semantic_diff, and review_basis surfaces.

resolved_items.title: Git realization payload
resolved_items.detail: A first realization payload now exists for state_projection and enrichment_projection targets.

resolved_items.title: Compatibility posture
resolved_items.detail: A compatibility assessment now exists for the git_substrate_role namespace and the new projection target kinds.

resolved_items.title: Realization workflow contract
resolved_items.detail: A Git-substrate realization workflow contract now exists and explicitly reuses the normalized manifest/report pattern.

resolved_items.title: Realization runner
resolved_items.detail: A first Git-substrate realization runner now exists and emits repo_state, diff_state, semantic_diff, plus normalized manifest/report artifacts.

resolved_items.title: Narrower transform surfaces
resolved_items.detail: The runner-owned Git transforms have been split into bounded gix and sem emitter artifacts while keeping the unified runner as the primary operator surface.

resolved_items.title: gix real runtime integration
resolved_items.detail: gix now has a real crate-backed runtime path through the repo-local Rust helper that emits repo_state and diff_state.

resolved_items.title: sem real runtime integration
resolved_items.detail: sem now has a real runtime path through the local sem source tree and emits semantic_diff plus review_basis.

resolved_items.title: Adapter closeout
resolved_items.detail: The first real-runtime adapter tranche is explicitly closed through adapter_closeout.v1.json; remaining work is script migration, not adapter framing.
